sessions.intent: Set up the rename plan for Ingi to critique — take ownership from coder's v1 draft, fix bisection hygiene, define Phase 4 groupings, scope Builder in.

before.assumptions: Coder wrote a v1 plan + captured baseline; Ingi wants the architect to own the plan shape so he can critique it. The branch already has a settled goal (lowercase PLang vocabulary, keep C# infra PascalCase).
before.risk: Plan reads as a draft pulled from coder rather than a designed structure. Mixing semantic change (Modules merge) with cosmetic rename poisons bisection.

actions.context: Architect spine. Six phases: root, Data/Type, Path, vocabulary sweep (4a-4d grouped by blast radius), Builder, close. Modules merge pulled out per Ingi's call. Builder lowercased per Ingi's call. Phase 4 groupings defined by blast radius not coupling — execution core / I/O / state-lifecycle / control-diagnostics.

after.status: Plan written, awaiting Ingi's critique. No code changes yet.
after.notes: Coder's v1 plan + baseline remain in .bot/app-lowercase/coder/v1/ as reference. Once Ingi signs off, this plan replaces coder's as the source of truth.

sessions.intent: Fix all 'App.' string literals in test files and production code after the App → app namespace rename.

before.assumptions: Branch already has the namespace rename in production C#. Test files have hardcoded 'App.' strings in reflection calls, assertions, and Roslyn stub sources.
before.risk: Generator tests use inline Roslyn source that must use 'app.modules' for the generator to recognize [Action] attributes. Fixture DLLs need rebuilding.

actions.context: Changed 'App.' string literals to 'app.' in reflection GetType() calls, assertions, generated file names, and inline Roslyn compilation stubs.
Updated fixture source files using directives from App.* to app.*, rebuilt DLLs and committed them.

Fixed StoreOnlyModifier namespace check from 'App.Goals' to 'app.Goals' — caused SaveGoal_CamelCase_StoreOnly to fail because non-[Store] properties (Errors, Warnings) were no longer filtered out of .pr JSON.

after.status: All 2752 tests passing. Both the original 16 string-literal failures and a hidden production bug in StoreOnlyModifier are fixed.
after.notes: The StoreOnlyModifier bug was not in the original task description but was discovered during test runs. Fixed as part of this session.

sessions.intent: Phase 4 namespace rename: fix ~80 source files where type-position bare references use old PascalCase names after top-level app/ folders renamed to lowercase.

before.assumptions: Directories already renamed. ~1260 build errors in source files using old PascalCase namespace references in type positions.
before.risk: sed-based replacement may hit expression-position property accesses (app.Goals.X) which must stay PascalCase. Global aliases (Snapshot, Variables, Step, Channel, Serializers) make Alias.@this invalid — must use alias alone.

actions.context: Fixed all type-position references after top-level app/ folder rename to lowercase. Key rules: Alias.@this is invalid (use alias alone); expression-position property accesses stay PascalCase; app.callstack.call.Errors namespace stayed PascalCase (exception); global:: qualifier required when relative resolution fails.

after.status: Build clean: 0 errors, 46 warnings. PLang.csproj and PLangConsole.csproj both build successfully.
after.notes: Discovered: (1) Global alias Foo.@this is always wrong — alias IS the @this type. (2) sed replaced expression-position property accesses (app.Goals, app.FileSystem) which needed reverting. (3) app.callstack.call.Errors is PascalCase namespace (exception). (4) Variables.Navigators.ValueNavigators needed global:: path since Variables is a type alias not a namespace.
